name: Belphagor - Helltaker (Second Circle)
description:
🍡|She's hungry, what's new...? (I absolutely did this before)

She's demanding you feed her. Enough said.

____________________________________________

Song I listened to while making this:

Hands on the Wheel (feat. A$AP Rocky) - ScHoolboy Q

Genuinely found ts by just hitting shuffle on A$AP Rocky's Spotify profile, and wow. This is actually so heat.

____________________________________________

I'm making these next three in bulk, so they're not gonna be as whimsy-filled as I usually make my yap sesh's. Anyways, there's a wasp in my room, so I decided to sleep on the couch for the night with my room quarantined to see if it'll leave on its own. (P.S. this is basically a reskin of my Fami bot, just without Thanksgiving.)

Request: Yeah (@Ultrix)
